titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of Art records15-00-980

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-09-18 00:13:37 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Art records

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and subject files of the Cornell University Department of Art.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Department of Art. Records, #15-00-980. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 4-5 are restricted to permission of the University Archivist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Subject files related to department business. Included are correspondence, meeting materials, job descriptions and inquiries, and files on curriculum and visiting artists.

did.unittitle: Application for Admission Slips: Staff Application Ratings
Association of the Alumni of the American Academy in Rome
College of Architecture Council (Art Review Committee)
College of Architecture Manual of Information and Office Procedures (1 of 2)
College of Architecture Manual of Information and Office Procedures (2 of 2)

Fine Arts Applicants Undergraduate and Graduate
Franklin Hall - Equipment & Furniture J. M. Hanson Report
Graduate Applic. Fellowships Information for J. O. M.
Graduate Program - M.F.A. Request for Application Forms
Hayes Committee - Questions Raised & Answers from Hayes Report
How Industrial Designers Should be Trained
Industrial Design Studies Curriculum (Others in Closet)
Mr. Mahoney and Personal Bills & Letters
Memorandums from College of Architecture Misc. (Old)
Memorandums Re: Faculty of College of Arch.
Memos to Deans, Directors, Dept. Heads
Memos to Deans, Directors, Dept. Heads
Memo Re: Language Requirement for Admission to the College of Arch.
Memos for J. O. M. (James O. Mahoney), Copies of
Memos for Mr. Mahoney, Copies of
Memos to Mr. Mahoney: 1968 (Deans, Directors, Dept. Heads)

Minutes to Faculty Meetings Extra Copies

controlaccess.corpname: National Association of Schools of Art and Design (U.S.)

did.unittitle: Newspaper Clippings Re: Exhibits, New Appts., Etc.
Notes for J. O. M. (James O. Mahoney)
Program Outlines: 1. Visual Forms in 20th Century 2. Arch. 350 - The Arts of Design 3. Art 311-312
Replies Re: Local Collections for White Exhibitions
Students (Arch.) Enrolled in Department of Art Courses, Spring Term, 1963 and Out of College and Extramural Students
Supplementary Announcements of Courses, Fall Term 1959
Supplementary Announcements of Courses - Spring Term, 1960
Supplementary Announcements of Courses - Fall Term, 1960
University Committee on the Arts - Memos, Etc.
Visiting Critics - Art - Edwin Dickinson, William Kienbusch

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Originally labelled as correspondence, this series is composed of files on department faculty.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Series arranged in alphabetical order by faculty surname. Faculty files preceded by general correspondence files.

did.unittitle: Colby, Victor (Graduate Assistant for Fine Arts)
Neiley, Robert G. (Assistant in History of Architecture)
Squier, Jack L. (Graduate Assistant in Fine Arts)
Tilton, John N. Correspondence Re: College Work
Wickersham, Edward D. (Research Associate in Architecture)
